title: Output: tell a conflict and resolution
subtitle: Explain disagreement without blaming.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: cada persona tenía una prioridad distinta
each person had a different priority
we tried to find a solution

items.es: Hubo un malentendido sobre la hora de la reunión.
items.en: There was a misunderstanding about the meeting time.

items.es: Cada persona tenía una prioridad distinta.
items.en: Each person had a different priority.

items.es: Al principio la conversación fue un poco tensa.
items.en: At first the conversation was a little tense.

items.es: Intentamos buscar una solución que funcionara para todos.
items.en: We tried to find a solution that worked for everyone.

items.es: Al final acordamos cambiar la reunión al día siguiente.
items.en: In the end we agreed to move the meeting to the next day.
